hostCorner.description: Point that lands on the real host corner or host face anchor.

braceWorkPoint.description: Point where the BRB/brace centerline connects.

columnFace.label: a
columnFace.description: Vertical edge that aligns to a column face.

beamFace.label: b
beamFace.description: Horizontal edge that aligns to a beam face.

braceAxis.description: Reference line from host corner to brace work point.

diagonalReference.description: Secondary diagonal reference used to detect mirroring/orientation.
